strategy: Low-health Life boss; hit with Death (+30%) and avoid Life (60% resist).
He is stunable and beguilable; a stun buys you a free setup Round.
He applies a -30% Weakness to all his allies on Round 1 and every third Round (only while he is alive), which slightly weakens the enemy side, not you.
At 1,560 health a single Death blade and one hit end him; clear the Brume Goblin with AoE if needed.
cheatNotes: Every third Round (from Round 1) a -30% Weakness lands on his own side while he is alive; it works against him, not you.
